In the access-token generation logic of free5GC, the AccessTokenScopeCheck() function in file internal/sbi/processor/access_token.go bypasses all scope validation when the attacker uses a crafted targetNF value. This allows attackers to obtain an access token with any arbitrary scope.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00307, "percentile": 0.22506}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q7c8-gfjh-8v4p", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T18:09:13Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q7c8-gfjh-8v4p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q7c8-gfjh-8v4p"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-66719"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-01-23T16:15:51Z", "published_at": "2026-01-23T18:31:28Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-66719", "https://github.com/free5gc/free5gc/issues/736", "https://github.com/free5gc/nrf/pull/73", "https://github.com/free5gc/free5gc/issues/733", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q7c8-gfjh-8v4p"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/free5gc/nrf", "summary": "Free5gc NRF is vulnerable to scope validation bypass via maliciously crafted targetNF value", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T18:09:13Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q7c8-gfjh-8v4p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.4.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/free5gc/nrf"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.4.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
